papers.title: KnowVal: A Knowledge-Augmented and Value-Guided Autonomous Driving System
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 知识增强+价值引导的端到端自动驾驶系统。三大模块：(1) 检索引导的开放世界感知；(2) 驱动知识图谱；(3) 世界模型+人类偏好价值模型。nuScenes最低碰撞率，Bench2Drive/NVISIM SOTA。

papers.title: SimScale: Learning to Drive via Real-World Simulation at Scale
papers.authors: Haochen Tian, Tianyu Li, Haochen Liu, Jiazhi Yang et al.
papers.summary: CVPR 2026 Oral。通过轨迹扰动+响应环境模拟+神经渲染生成大规模仿真数据。NAVSIM v2 navhard +8.6 EPDMS，性能随仿真数据量平滑扩展。CASIA/OpenDriveLab/小米汽车联合。

papers.title: LVDrive: Latent Visual Representation Enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model
papers.reasoning: 提出隐式视觉表示增强VLA驾驶模型，解决稀疏动作监督问题。核心是LV Drive框架，端到端驾驶VLA方向重要贡献。
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising framework for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing VLAs typically rely on sparse action supervision, which underutilizes their powerful scene understanding and reasoning capabilities. LVDrive proposes a Latent Visual Representation enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model that bridges this gap.

papers.title: Pre-VLA: Preemptive Runtime Verification for Reliable Vision-Language-Action and World-Model Rollouts
papers.reasoning: 提出Pre-VLA运行时验证框架，同时覆盖VLA和世界模型rollout的安全检查。将runtime verification方法引入VLA部署，对实际应用可靠性至关重要。
papers.abstract: While large vision-language-action (VLA) models and generative world models (WM) have advanced long-horizon embodied intelligence, their practical deployment remains challenged by uncertainty in learning-based action generation. Pre-VLA proposes preemptive runtime verification to identify low-quality actions before execution.

papers.title: RESBev: Making BEV Perception More Robust
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 插件式BEV感知鲁棒增强框架，利用潜空间世界模型预测来自历史帧的干净BEV语义先验，再通过异常重建器与污染当前观测融合。在 nuScenes 上使四种 LSS 模型在10种扰动下平均提升15-20 IoU。

papers.title: MapGCLR: Geospatial Contrastive Learning for Online Vectorized HD Map Construction
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 利用多趟次地理重叠的 BEV 特征构建地理空间对比学习（InfoNCE损失），实现半监督在线 HD Map。仅用5%标注数据即达到18.9 mAP（超越全监督13.3基线42%）。

papers.title: CycleBEV: Regularizing View Transformation Networks via View Cycle Consistency
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 通过视角循环一致性正则化BEV视图变换网络，增强几何一致性。

papers.title: Scaling-Aware Data Selection for End-to-End Driving (MOSAIC)
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 面向端到端驾驶的缩放感知数据选择方法。

papers.title: Sensor2Sensor: Cross-Embodiment Sensor Conversion for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 将dashcam视频转化为多模态AV传感器数据(相机+LiDAR)，解决数据稀缺问题。使用4DGS重建+扩散架构。创新性强但偏数据工具。
papers.abstract: Robust training and validation of Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) require massive, diverse datasets. Proprietary data collected by Autonomous Vehicle (AV) fleets, while high-fidelity, are limited in scale, diversity of sensor configurations, as well as geographic and long-tail-behavioral coverage. Sensor2Sensor proposes a novel generative modeling paradigm that translates in-the-wild monocular dashcam videos into a high-fidelity, multi-modal sensor suite (AV logs) comprising multi-view camera images and LiDAR point clouds.

papers.title: HorizonForge: Driving Scene Editing with Any Trajectories and Any Vehicles
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 可编辑高斯泼溅+车辆网格的统一驾驶场景编辑框架。支持轨迹控制和语言驱动车辆插入，视频扩散模型渲染一致性视频。用户偏好率91.02%。

papers.title: ProOOD: Prototype-Guided Out-of-Distribution 3D Occupancy Prediction
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 原型引导的分布外3D占用预测。

papers.title: O3N: Omnidirectional Open-Vocabulary Occupancy Prediction
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 全向开放词汇3D占用预测。

papers.title: OccAny: Generalized Unconstrained Urban 3D Occupancy
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 泛化无约束城市3D占用预测。

papers.title: GPOcc: Generalizing Visual Geometry Priors to Sparse Gaussian Occupancy
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 将视觉几何先验泛化到稀疏高斯占用预测。

papers.title: Dr.Occ: Depth- and Region-Guided 3D Occupancy for Incomplete Cameras
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 深度和区域引导的3D占用预测，支持摄像头缺失场景。

papers.title: TTSG: Traffic Scene Generation from Natural Language
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 从自然语言生成交通场景。

papers.title: Look Before You Fuse: 2D-Guided Cross-Modal Alignment for 3D Detection
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 2D引导的跨模态对齐策略用于3D检测。

papers.title: CoIn3D: Configuration-Invariant Multi-Camera 3D Detection
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 配置不变的多相机3D检测，对相机配置变化具有鲁棒性。

papers.title: R4Det: 4D Radar-Camera Fusion for 3D Detection
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 4D毫米波雷达-相机融合用于3D目标检测。

papers.title: TerraSeg: Self-Supervised Ground Segmentation for Any LiDAR
papers.authors: Multiple authors
papers.summary: 自监督地面分割方法，适用于任意LiDAR传感器。

papers.title: LACO: Adaptive Latent Communication for Collaborative Driving
papers.reasoning: 协作驾驶中的自适应潜空间通信。与VLA间接相关，偏V2V通信方向。
papers.abstract: Collaborative driving aims to improve safety and efficiency by enabling connected vehicles to coordinate under partial observability. LACO evolves from sharing visual features to exchanging language-based reasoning through foundation models.

papers.title: GesVLA: Gesture-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model Embedded Representations
papers.reasoning: 手势感知VLA模型，偏机器人人机交互。与驾驶VLA间接相关。
papers.abstract: GesVLA proposes gesture-aware VLA models that incorporate human gesture understanding into action prediction.

papers.title: FRED: A Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Dataset for Flooded Road Environments
papers.reasoning: 涉水路况多模态数据集。极端工况数据，有意义但偏数据集工作。
papers.abstract: FRED introduces a multi-modal autonomous driving dataset specifically designed for flooded road environments.

papers.title: Enhancing Multimodal Large Language Models for Safety-Critical Driving Video Analysis
papers.reasoning: 增强MLLM进行安全关键驾驶视频分析。偏VLM分析而非端到端控制。
papers.abstract: Enhancing MLLMs for analyzing safety-critical driving scenarios from video data.

papers.title: AwareVLN: Reasoning with Self-awareness for Vision-Language Navigation
papers.reasoning: 具身导航中引入自我意识推理。VLN方向，与驾驶有交集但不直接。
papers.abstract: AwareVLN introduces self-awareness reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation agents.

papers.title: GA-VLN: Geometry-Aware BEV Representation for Efficient Vision-Language Navigation
papers.reasoning: 几何感知BEV表示用于VLN。BEV在导航中的应用，偏室内/机器人导航。
papers.abstract: GA-VLN proposes geometry-aware BEV representations for efficient vision-language navigation.

papers.title: CrossVLA: Cross-Paradigm Post-Training and Inference Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.reasoning: 系统研究VLA两种主流架构(离散token自回归 vs 连续动作flow-matching)的DPO偏好对齐和推理优化。对VLA实用化部署有直接指导意义。
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have rapidly converged on a small set of architectural patterns: discrete-token autoregression (e.g. OpenVLA) and continuous-action flow-matching (e.g. pi-0.5). CrossVLA explores preference alignment via DPO across both paradigms.

papers.title: Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics
papers.reasoning: 发现Driving VLA忽略视觉token的问题，用逆运动学视角重新定义轨迹恢复任务。对驾驶VLA的结构性改进有重要意义。
papers.abstract: Existing Driving VLAs predict trajectories while largely ignoring their visual tokens -- a phenomenon we trace not to insufficient training but to a structurally ill-posed task formulation. Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics shows that trajectory recovery, through the lens of inverse kinematics, provides a principled grounding mechanism.

papers.title: VLANeXt: Recipes for Building Strong VLA Models
papers.reasoning: 系统探究VLA构建方法：视觉编码器、动作预测头、训练策略。VLA的基础性工作。
papers.abstract: Following the rise of large foundation models, Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) emerged, leveraging strong visual and language understanding from Vision-Language Models for general-purpose policy learning. VLANeXt explores recipes for building strong VLA models.

papers.title: EvoScene-VLA: Evolving Scene Beliefs Inside the Action Decoder for Chunked Robot Control
papers.reasoning: 在VLA action decoder内部演化场景信念，解决遮挡和物体运动问题。机器人领域但与驾驶VLA有交叉。
papers.abstract: Chunked vision-language-action (VLA) policies predict multi-step robot controls, conditioning each update on the current visual observation alone. EvoScene-VLA evolves scene beliefs inside the action decoder, addressing challenges of contact, occlusion, and object motion.

papers.title: Lost in Fog: Sensor Perturbations Expose Reasoning Fragility in Driving VLAs
papers.reasoning: 研究Driving VLA在传感器退化(雾、噪声等)下的推理脆弱性，对实际部署安全性有参考价值。
papers.abstract: Interpretable autonomous driving planners depend not only on generating explanations, but also on those explanations remaining reliable under real-world sensor degradation. A controlled perturbation study of VLA robustness under sensor degradation.

papers.title: Distill to Think, Foresee to Act: Cognitive-Physical Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 用RL突破IL上限，结合认知基础模型+世界模型预测。端到端驾驶+RL方向的重要探索。
papers.abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving models are fundamentally constrained by the behavioral cloning ceiling of imitation learning. Distill to Think, Foresee to Act proposes using RL with (1) a cognitive foundation model for reasoning and (2) a physical world model for foresight.

papers.title: DriveMA: Rethinking Language Interfaces in Driving VLAs with One-Step Meta-Actions
papers.reasoning: 论文已被撤回，但研究重新思考Driving VLA的语言接口，提出一步元动作。
papers.abstract: Driving Vision-Language-Action Models (Driving VLAs) commonly introduce natural-language reasoning as an intermediate interface for end-to-end planning, but reasoning-centric interfaces face three practical bottlenecks: obtaining high-quality reasoning annotations, ensuring inference efficiency, and verifying plan feasibility.

papers.title: Closed Loop Dynamic Driving Data Mixture for Real-Synthetic Co-Training
papers.reasoning: 真实-合成数据协同训练的闭环数据混合策略。数据层面工作，对端到端训练有参考价值。
papers.abstract: Data scaling is fundamental to modern deep learning, and grows increasingly critical as autonomous driving shifts to end-to-end learning. This work proposes a closed loop dynamic data mixture for real-synthetic co-training.

papers.title: Improving 3D Labeling in Self-Driving by Inferring Vehicle Information using Vision Language Models
papers.reasoning: 用VLM推断车辆信息改进3D标注。偏数据标注工具。
papers.abstract: Using Vision Language Models to infer vehicle information for improved 3D labeling in self-driving scenarios.

papers.title: ScenePilot: Controllable Boundary-Driven Critical Scenario Generation for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 边界驱动的关键场景生成用于自动驾驶测试。偏测试验证方向。
papers.abstract: Safety-critical scenarios are central to evaluating autonomous driving systems. ScenePilot proposes controllable boundary-driven critical scenario generation.

papers.title: A Task-Agnostic Algebraic Integrity Metric for Event-Camera Streams Toward SOTIF-Compliant Perception
papers.reasoning: 事件相机感知完整性度量。偏感知硬件方向。
papers.abstract: Proposes an algebraic integrity metric for event-camera streams for SOTIF-compliant perception.

papers.title: STELLAR: Scaling 3D Perception Large Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.reasoning: 自动驾驶3D感知大模型的scaling方法。与BEV感知、端到端感知相关。
papers.abstract: STELLAR tackles scaling 3D perception large models specifically for autonomous driving, addressing the unique challenges of the driving domain.

papers.title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Safe Autonomous Driving Under Pedestrian Behavioral Uncertainty
papers.reasoning: 行人行为不确定性下的多智能体RL安全驾驶。偏安全决策方向。
papers.abstract: Multi-agent RL approach for safe autonomous driving considering pedestrian behavioral uncertainty.

papers.title: WildRoadBench: A Wild Aerial Road-Damage Grounding Benchmark for Vision-Language Models
papers.reasoning: 航拍道路损伤检测基准。偏基础设施监测。
papers.abstract: WildRoadBench is a benchmark for aerial road-damage grounding using VLMs.

papers.title: From Automated to Autonomous: Hierarchical Agent-native Network Architecture (HANA)
papers.reasoning: 分层Agent网络架构。偏通用自主Agent架构。
papers.abstract: HANA proposes a hierarchical agent-native network architecture for transitioning from automated to autonomous systems.

papers.title: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning
papers.reasoning: 自优化自主Agent终身学习。通用Agent方向。
papers.abstract: SOLAR proposes a self-optimizing open-ended autonomous agent for lifelong learning.

papers.title: Identifiable Token Correspondence for World Models
papers.reasoning: 解决token世界模型长程rollout中的时间不一致问题(物体重复/消失)，对世界模型稳定性有贡献。
papers.abstract: Token-based transformer world models have shown strong performance in visual reinforcement learning, but often suffer from temporal inconsistency in long-horizon rollouts. Identifiable Token Correspondence addresses object duplication, disappearance, and transmutation.

papers.title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models
papers.reasoning: 在任务无关世界模型中对VLA进行RL后训练。直接结合VLA+世界模型+RL，与VLA for driving高度相关。
papers.abstract: Post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models via reinforcement learning (RL) in learned world models has emerged as an effective strategy to adapt to new tasks without costly real-world interactions.

papers.title: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Ego-Centric Joint Scene Modeling
papers.authors: Moon, Seokha; Lee, Minseung; Seo, Joon; Kim, Jinkyu; Lee, Jungbeom
papers.summary: 提出因果感知的端到端驾驶方法CaAD，通过以自我为中心联合场景建模，建模自车与周围智能体的因果相互依赖关系，实现更一致的轨迹预测。

papers.title: Learning Responsibility-Attributed Adversarial Scenarios for Testing Autonomous Vehicles
papers.authors: Xiao, Yizhuo; Yan, Haotian; Wang, Ying; Zhu, Zhongpan; Zhang, Yuxin
papers.summary: 提出CARS方法，生成可归责责任的对抗性驾驶场景，区分系统缺陷导致的故障与不可避免的交通冲突，提升自动驾驶安全验证的可信度。

papers.title: Generative Texture Diversification of 3D Pedestrians for Robust Autonomous Driving Perception
papers.authors: Bhowmick, Arka; Ozeren, Enes; Abdullah, Ahmed; Wasenmuller, Oliver
papers.summary: 利用生成模型对3D行人纹理进行多样化，提升自动驾驶感知模型在长尾场景中的泛化鲁棒性，解决真实数据多样性不足问题。

papers.title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Lu, Xiaohu; Khatounabadi, Hamed; Radha, Hayder
papers.summary: 提出多源多模态无监督域自适应3D目标检测方法MUSDA，利用多个标注数据集提升在新环境中的检测鲁棒性，无需人工标注。

papers.title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Aher, Shiva
papers.summary: DRIVE-C是一个受控退化数据集，在真实驾驶视频上施加物理启发的合成退化（噪声、模糊、天气等），用于评估自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性。

papers.title: AtteConDA: Attention-Based Conflict Suppression in Multi-Condition Diffusion Models and Synthetic Data Augmentation
papers.authors: Noguchi, Shogo
papers.summary: 提出AtteConDA方法，通过注意力机制抑制多条件扩散模型中的条件冲突，实现更高质量的高层驾驶任务合成数据增强。

papers.title: Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology for Driving Scene Reasoning
papers.authors: Li, Han; Gao, Yulu; Liu, Si; Wang, Yuhang; Liu, Bo
papers.summary: 提出统一的车道与车道拓扑建模方法，打破传统先检测后推理范式，在端到端框架中同时学习车道线和拓扑关系。

papers.title: Enhancing Consistency Models for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction
papers.authors: Mrdovic, Alen; Qingze; Liu; Li, Danrui; Schwartz, Mathew
papers.summary: 改进一致性模型实现多智能体轨迹预测的真实单步生成，解决扩散模型推理延迟问题，适用于自动驾驶等时延敏感场景。

papers.title: SceneFactory: GPU-Accelerated Multi-Agent Driving Simulation with Physics-Based Vehicle Dynamics
papers.authors: Zhu, Yicheng; Chen, Yang; Li, Tao; Bian, Zilin
papers.summary: 提出SceneFactory GPU加速驾驶仿真器，在保持物理保真度的同时实现大规模并行训练，桥接GPU批量仿真与物理精确动力学之间的鸿沟。

papers.title: Distill, Diffuse, and Semanticize (DDS): Annotation-Free 3D Scene Understanding
papers.authors: Wang, Yijing; Li, Ruonan; Wang, Qilin; Zhao, Rongqiang; Liu, Jie
papers.summary: 提出DDS无标注3D场景理解方法，结合多粒度蒸馏和图扩散分割，适用于自动驾驶、数字孪生等场景的3D语义理解。

papers.title: Guide, Think, Act: Interactive Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.title_cn: GTA-VLA：VLA模型的交互式具身推理
papers.authors: Yiran Ling, Qing Lian, Jinghang Li, Qing Jiang, Tianming Zhang, Xiaoke Jiang, Chuanxiu Liu, Jie Liu, Lei Zhang
papers.summary: 提出三阶段Guide-Think-Act VLA框架，允许用户通过视觉线索实时引导机器人策略。突破端到端Sense-to-Act在OOD下的脆弱性，实现可纠错的交互式执行。

papers.title: EponaV2: Driving World Model with Comprehensive Future Reasoning
papers.title_cn: EponaV2：全面未来推理的驾驶世界模型
papers.authors: Jiawei Xu, Zhizhou Zhong, Zhijian Shu, Mingkai Jia, Mingxiao Li, Jia-Wang Bian, Qian Zhang, Kaicheng Zhang, Jin Xie, Jian Yang
papers.summary: 超越纯帧预测，训练世界模型预测未来几何和语义地图。引入流匹配GRPO机制，NAVSIM感知-free模型SOTA（+1.3 PDMS/+5.5 EPDMS）。

papers.title: CLOVER: Closed-Loop Value Estimation & Ranking for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Planning
papers.title_cn: CLOVER：端到端自动驾驶规划的闭环价值估计与排序
papers.authors: Sining Ang, Yuguang Yang, Canyu Chen, Yan Wang
papers.summary: 提出Generator-Scorer框架解决训练-评估不匹配问题。保守闭环自蒸馏使scorer辅助generator优化，NAVSIM上PDMS 94.5/EPDMS 90.4达到SOTA。

papers.title: MindVLA-U1: VLA Beats VA with Unified Streaming Architecture for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: MindVLA-U1：统一流式架构让VLA超越VA的自动驾驶方案
papers.authors: Yuzhou Huang, Benjin Zhu, Hengtong Lu, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Haiming Zhang, Wei Chen, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie, Hongsheng Li
papers.summary: 首次证明VLA架构在规划质量上超越传统VA。统一VLM骨干在单次前向传播中同时生成语言token（可选）和流匹配连续动作轨迹。全流式设计逐帧处理驾驶视频，无需固定视频-动作块。学习式流式分布对齐实现平滑轨迹演化。

papers.title: MAPLE: Latent Multi-Agent Play for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: MAPLE：端到端自动驾驶的潜空间多智能体博弈框架
papers.authors: Rajeev Yasarla, Deepti Hegde, Hsin-Pai Cheng, Shizhong Han, Yunxiao Shi, Meysam Sadeghigooghari, Hanno Ackermann, Litian Liu, Pranav Desai, Fatih Porikli, Mohammad Ghavamzadeh, Hong Cai
papers.summary: 在VLA潜空间中实现反应式多智能体rollout，两阶段训练：潜空间SFT + RL（全局+智能体奖励）。引入多样性奖励生成日志外行为。无需外部模拟器，可扩展的闭环训练。Bench2Drive SOTA。

papers.title: Action Emergence from Streaming Intent
papers.title_cn: 流式意图驱动的端到端驾驶动作涌现
papers.authors: Pengfei Jing, Victor Shea-Jay Huang, Hengtong Lu, Jifeng Dai, Yan Xie, Benjin Zhu
papers.summary: 提出Streaming Intent范式：自回归解码四步推理链并发射意图token，意图驱动CFG流匹配动作头，仅2步去噪即可生成轨迹。Waymo E2E榜RFS 7.96 val / 7.74 test。首次实现全端到端VLA的意图可控性。

papers.title: Contrastive Latent-space Prompt Optimization for End-to-end Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 对比隐空间提示优化的端到端自动驾驶
papers.authors: Ruiyang Zhu, et al.
papers.summary: CLAP提出对比隐空间提示优化，利用V2X通信为VLA驾驶模型按路段作软提示优化。在NAVSIM上减少24%长尾场景规划错误，正常场景无退化。

papers.title: A Joint World Model Integrating Reconstruction and Generation for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 面向自动驾驶的重建与生成联合世界模型
papers.authors: Lijun Zhou, Hongcheng Luo, Zhenxin Zhu, et al.
papers.summary: JWM统一世界模型的表示(WorldRec/3D高斯重建)与生成(WorldGen/双向预训练+因果微调)能力。4步去噪即可实现高质量因果视频生成，支撑闭环仿真与端到端训练。Xiaomi EV技术报告。

papers.title: End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Safety Guidance
papers.title_cn: 带安全引导的端到端自动驾驶
papers.authors: Shounak Sural, et al.
papers.summary: DriveSafer针对生成式端到端规划器的灾难性安全失败，在训练时加入安全约束、推理时加入安全引导。相比DiffusionDrive减少48%灾难性失败，驶入区域合规失败减少65%。

papers.title: GaussianWorld: Gaussian World Model for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: GaussianWorld：基于高斯世界模型的自动驾驶场景表示与预测
papers.authors: Siyu Chen, et al.
papers.summary: GaussianWorld以4D高斯场景表示为世界模型核心，统一完成感知+预测+规划。用稀疏3D查询从多视图图像中重建高斯参数，时间平滑项保证时序一致性。

papers.title: DriveMoe: A Hybrid Vision-Language-Action Model for Scalable Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: DriveMoe：可扩展的混合视觉-语言-动作驾驶模型
papers.authors: Xiaodong Tian, et al.
papers.summary: DriveMoe提出混合VLA架构，融合稀疏MoE与密集Transformer以平衡效率与性能。在nuScenes和NAVSIM上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Learning Direct Control Policies with Flow Matching for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 流匹配直接控制策略的自动驾驶规划
papers.authors: Marcello Ceresini, Federico Pirazzoli, Andrea Bertogalli, Lorenzo Cipelli, Filippo D'Addeo, Anthony Dell'Eva, Alessandro Paolo Capasso, Alberto Broggi
papers.summary: 流匹配规划器直接输出加速度/曲率控制轨迹，以BEV栅格为条件，少量ODE步实现实时重规划。仅城市仿真数据训练，泛化到高速公路等OOD场景。

papers.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer
papers.title_cn: SANA-WM：混合线性注意力扩散Transformer的高效分钟级世界建模
papers.authors: Haoyi Zhu, Haozhe Liu, Yuyang Zhao, Tian Ye, Junsong Chen, Jincheng Yu, Tong He, Song Han, Enze Xie
papers.summary: 2.6B参数开源世界模型，原生支持720p分钟级视频生成和6-DoF相机控制。仅213K视频训练，36×吞吐量优于基线。蒸馏版RTX5090上60s视频仅34s。

papers.title: Gaussian Evolution Model for Occupancy Forecasting and Motion Planning
papers.title_cn: 高斯演化模型：用于占据预测与运动规划的场景演化
papers.authors: Yuanchao Wu, et al.
papers.summary: GEM以显式连续4D高斯原语表示驾驶场景，直接查询任意时间戳的高斯世界表示进行非自回归占据预测和运动规划，避免自回归误差累积。

papers.title: Towards Robust Vision-Language-Action Models without Extra Data
papers.title_cn: 无需额外数据的鲁棒VLA模型
papers.authors: Ying Wang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出IB-Adapter（信息瓶颈适配器），无需额外数据或增强，在可见扰动下VLA模型性能提升30%。0.5B参数StableVLA即可匹敌7B模型鲁棒性。

papers.title: PointForward: Feedforward Driving Reconstruction through Point-Aligned Representations
papers.title_cn: PointForward：点对齐表示的驾驶场景前馈重建
papers.authors: Cheng Chi, Xianqi Wang, Hongcheng Luo, Mingfei Tu, Gangwei Xu, Zehan Zhang, Bing Wang, Guang Chen, Hangjun Ye, Sida Peng, Xin Yang, Haiyang Sun
papers.summary: 提出点对齐表示的驾驶场景前馈重建框架，世界空间初始化稀疏3D查询，通过时空融合聚合多视图信息，引入场景图处理动态实例。在大型驾驶基准数据集上SOTA。

papers.title: Still Camouflage, Moving Illusion: View-Induced Trajectory Manipulation in Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 静态伪装、运动幻觉：视角诱导的自动驾驶轨迹操纵
papers.authors: Zhongwen Zhang, et al.
papers.summary: 研究发现可通过伪装/干扰物体外观诱导端到端自动驾驶模型产生错误运动预测和规划轨迹。揭示端到端视觉感知系统的对抗脆弱性。

papers.title: Real2Sim: A Physics-driven and Editable Gaussian Splatting Framework for Autonomous Driving Scenes
papers.title_cn: Real2Sim：自动驾驶场景的物理驱动可编辑高斯泼溅框架
papers.authors: Tianyi Huang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出物理驱动可编辑Gaussian Splatting框架，将真实驾驶场景重建为可交互的数字仿真环境，支持场景元素编辑和物理交互。

papers.title: Think as Needed: Geometry-Driven Adaptive Perception for Autonomous Driving
papers.title_cn: 按需思考：几何驱动的自适应自动驾驶感知
papers.authors: Donghyun Kim, et al.
papers.summary: 自适应感知架构，用无监督几何复杂度估计器动态选择轻/重处理路径。线性空间子网替代二次交互，持久化时序记忆模块可恢复5秒以上遮挡。nuScenes/CARLA：简单场景延迟-38%，长尾mAP+2.7。

papers.title: GSMap: 2D Gaussians for Online HD Mapping
papers.title_cn: GSMap：基于2D高斯的在线高精地图构建
papers.authors: Zhenxuan Zeng, et al.
papers.summary: 统一矢量化与光栅化HD地图构建。地图元素建模为2D高斯序列，通过可微分渲染施加像素级几何约束并进行拓扑感知矢量优化。nuScenes和Argoverse2上SOTA。

papers.title: Dynamic Execution Commitment of Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.title_cn: VLA模型的动态执行承诺机制
papers.authors: Chen Chen, et al.
papers.summary: A3机制将VLA动作分块执行转为自适应接受，基于群采样的一致性分数决定接受或拒绝哪些动作，实现效率与成功率平衡。

papers.title: One-Step Global Planning for Vision-Language Navigation on Top-Down Maps
papers.title_cn: 基于俯视图的视觉-语言导航单步全局规划
papers.authors: NavOne Team
papers.summary: NavOne将VLN重定义为预建俯视图上的单步全局路径规划，端到端直接预测密集路径概率。规划速度比现有地图方法快8倍，比自我中心方法快80倍。

papers.title: Investigating Generalized Physical Interaction in Action-Conditioned Video World Models

papers.summary: ACWM-Phys构建新基准评估动作条件世界模型在不同物理动力学下的预测能力，涵盖刚体、运动学、可变形物体、粒子系统，提供ID/OOD评估协议。

papers.title: Post-Training Vision-Language Models for Safety-Critical Autonomous Driving Events

papers.summary: VLM-AutoDrive提出模块化后训练框架，使通用VLM适配安全关键驾驶事件检测（碰撞/近碰撞），将Cosmos-Reason1的Collision F1从0.00提升到0.69。

papers.title: Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?

papers.authors: Lingjun Zhang, Changjie Wu, Linzhe Shi, et al.

papers.title: VLA-Driver: Vision-Language-Action Pretraining for Urban Driving
papers.authors: Anonymous

papers.title: SafeAlign-VLA: A Negative-Enhanced Safe Alignment Framework for Risk-Aware Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems excel in common scenarios but struggle with safety-critical long-tail cases. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are promising due to their strong reasoning capabilities. However, most VLA-based approaches rely on positive expert demonstrations, rarely exploiting negative samples, leading to insufficient understanding of risky behaviors and safety boundaries. To address this limitation, we propose SafeAlign-VLA, a unified negative-enhanced safe alignment framework that incorporates negative data into supervised learning and reinforcement learning.
papers.comments: 89.1 PDMS on NAVSIM v1. Collision rate 3.36%. Uses counterfactual reasoning + group relative policy optimization.

papers.title: Heterogeneous End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Trajectory-Guided World Models
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has emerged as a compelling alternative to traditional modular pipelines by directly mapping raw sensor data to driving actions. While recent approaches achieve strong performance on single-domain datasets, their performance degrades significantly when trained jointly across multiple heterogeneous domains. To address this, we propose a trajectory-driven learning paradigm that organizes training around planning trajectories, enabling the model to capture domain-invariant representations of driving intent. Furthermore, we incorporate a world model that predicts future latent features conditioned on ego actions.
papers.comments: Evaluated on nuScenes, NAVSIM, Waymo. Uses trajectory-guided world model for domain-invariant feature learning.

papers.title: BeyondDrive: Beyond Imitation — Learning Safe End-to-End Autonomous Driving from Hard Negatives
papers.abstract: Existing imitation learning methods for end-to-end autonomous driving predominantly learn from successful demonstrations by minimizing geometric deviations from expert trajectories. This paradigm implicitly assumes that spatial proximity implies behavioral safety, leading to a critical objective mismatch. To address this limitation, we propose BeyondDrive, a failure-aware imitation learning framework that jointly learns from successful and failed driving behaviors.
papers.comments: 89.7 PDMS on NAVSIMv1. Uses flow matching for negative trajectory generation. Zero-shot transfer to HUGSIM.
